changes_made.description: Baseline run with original verbose SKILL.md
changes_made.notes: git-log-analyze: model stuck in infinite loop repeating same date command, never wrote output file

changes_made.description: Restructured SKILL.md to be task-oriented with batch git commands, added macOS date notes, emphasized writing output immediately
changes_made.notes: Both tasks passed. git-log-analyze fixed by providing batch command template and date format guidance

changes_made.description: Added stronger CRITICAL instruction to never use glob for .git, use git -C directly
changes_made.notes: git-log-analyze: model still used glob first despite instructions, gave up when glob found no .git

changes_made.description: Made glob prohibition even more prominent with MANDATORY RULES section, added WRONG/CORRECT examples
changes_made.notes: Same glob issue - model ignores skill instructions about not using glob

changes_made.description: Refined FIRST ACTION RULE, emphasized complete JSON with closing braces, added JSON examples, fixed commit counting guidance
changes_made.notes: Both tasks collected correct data but wrote malformed JSON (missing closing braces). Model behavior is inconsistent across runs.

key_findings: qwen3-30b has a strong tendency to use glob to check for .git directories, which always fails since glob cannot see hidden dirs
The model sometimes gets stuck in infinite loops repeating the same command
JSON output is frequently truncated (missing closing braces)
Behavior is highly non-deterministic - same skill produces wildly different scores across runs
Providing batch git command templates and explicit JSON examples helps when the model follows them
The model sometimes ignores system prompt instructions (skill content) entirely
